Staff room, sterile, organized, clinical, efficient, supportive. 


The air was filled with the hum of activity, reminiscent of a bustling hospital ward, where each piece of equipment was meticulously placed, and the doctors and nurses moved with precision, always ready to attend to the needs of their patients. The atmosphere was both sterile and clinical, yet there was a sense of support that permeated the environment, making it easier for the staff to navigate through the complexities of their daily responsibilities.
